Enjoy our inspired menu against a vibrant soundtrack and an atmosphere of elegance.
View our menu
Happenings
What’s Happening at Tall Tales
True Nashville nights begin and end at Tall Tales, where there’s always something going on. From special events to specialty cocktails, from skilled DJs to legendary live music, our happenings blend sophistication and elegance with homegrown Nashville spirit. Come see what’s happening at Tall Tales Rooftop Bar.
Join Us Tonight
Private Events
Events With Skyline Views
Our private events bring your soundtrack to life with menus and music that make an impression. Relax with your guests as you enjoy incredible views and a rooftop escape unlike any other. Whether it’s an intimate gathering or a lively celebration, Tall Tales sets the stage for an unforgettable experience.
Plan Your Event
Tall Tales
The Rhythm of Nashville, Refined
Every evening at Tall Tales brings incredible music, savory tapas, and delightful cocktails. Located in legendary East Nashville, Tall Tales Rooftop Bar offers a relaxing, unique place to activate your Music City spirit. Join us for live music, DJs, drink specials, and exciting events as we keep the beats strong, the pours perfect, and the vibes easy.
View Our Events Calendar

meta.meta_description: Experience East Nashville's go-to rooftop venue. Enjoy sophisticated pours, craveable bites, and skyline views at Tall Tales Rooftop Bar. Book your table now.
